description: You are an Electrical Engineer at a semiconductor firm. Fix the five critical bugs in the Python SPICE netlist parser located at /home/ga/workspace/spice_parser/ so that the test suite passes. The parser currently misreads Mega-ohm resistors as milli-ohms, mangles op-amp subcircuit connections, fails on continuation lines, corrupts math expressions with asterisks, and fails to treat 'GND' and '0' as equivalent nodes.
